# Plinthos

> AI-powered ESG report writing and RICS 4th Edition compliance platform for UK real estate.

## About
- Founded by Dr Yishuang (Sherry) Xu, University of Manchester
- Built on analysis of 136 UK REIT sustainability reports
- Proprietary 120-point ESG scoring framework

## Key Pages
- [For Real Estate Funds](https://plinthos.io/)
- [For Valuers & Lenders](https://plinthos.io/valuers.html)
- [White Paper](https://plinthos.io/whitepaper.html)
- [Free CRREM Misalignment Engine](https://plinthos.io/tools/misalignment-engine.html)

- [CRREM Excel Tool Retirement](https://plinthos.io/crrem-tool-excel-retirement.html)
